line_preview: ## Run below code to reproduce results for appendix and manuscript.
## Please see each individual script for additional details.
## Note: you must run appendix_section_a.R before manuscript.R
## Use devtools to install attentive package if not already installed:
## install.packages("devtools")
## devtools::install_github("kylepeyton/attentive")
suppressMessages({
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggforce)
library(lemon)
library(rmeta)
library(coefplot)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggthemes)
library(grid)
library(attentive)
library(estimatr)
library(xtable)
library(RCurl)
library(haven)
## Helper functions needed to run the replication code below.
source("helpers.R")
## 1. Replication code for Online Appendix Section A
source("appendix_section_a.R")
## 2. Replication code for Online Appendix Section B
source("appendix_section_b.R")
## 3. Replication code for Manuscript
## Note: this script has been updated to correct the coding errors described
## at https://doi.org/10.1017/XPS.2022.23
source("manuscript.R")
## Description of datasets included in the replication archive:
## 1. phc_replications.rds is the dataset for the covid-era replications
## 2. phc_lucid_completes.rds is the data for Fig. 1 in manuscript
## 3. phc_meta_trends.rds is the data for Fig. 4 in manuscript
## 4. manylabs_asian_disease.sav pre-covid replication data for Study 3
## 5. cm_asian_disease.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 3
## 6. hp_welfare.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 4
## 7. gss_welfare.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 4
## 8. druckman_original.csv pre-covid replication data for Study 5
## 9. gilens_original.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 6
## 10. psv_original.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 8
## 11. abp_replication.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 8
## 12. conjoint_original.dta pre-covid replication data for Study 9
## 13. pwk_original.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 10
## 14. tw_original.rds pre-covid replication data for Study 11
## 15. peyton_original.csv pre-covid replication data for Study 12
